title: always @* for constant assignments
body:
Using always @* for constant assignments is giving me trouble in v11_0:

```
module test ();
  reg y;
  always @* begin
    y = 1'b0;
  end
  initial begin
    #1;
    $display("Value of y: %b", y);
  end
endmodule
```
```
iverilog -Wall '-g2012' test.v
test.v:3: warning: @* found no sensitivities so it will never trigger.
./a.out
Value of y: x
```
I would expect it to evaluate at time=0
